label: London
note: Highest salaries available but cost of living and housing eat most of the premium.

label: Manchester
note: Strong tech/media scene, much lower housing cost than London.

label: Birmingham
note: Large, diverse job market across finance, engineering, public sector.

label: Edinburgh
note: Strong finance/insurance and life sciences sector.

label: Leeds
note: Growing finance and digital sector, lower cost of living.

label: Cardiff
note: Lower cost of living, public sector and media presence.

label: Remote / smaller town
note: Lowest cost of living; depends on remote-friendly career and broadband.
